title: Vocational School - Announcement for Instructor Recruitment
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 30 November 2017

Vocational School - Announcement for Instructor Recruitment

An INSTRUCTOR shall be recruited by our institution as per the provisions of "

Regulation on Central and Entrance Examinations to be Implemented for Tranfer-based or Extramural Appointments in Instructor Posts Excluding Lecturers

" published in the Official Gazette dated 31.07.2008 and the requirements stipulated in article 33 of Higher Education Law no.2547.

Minimum ALES score of 70 (in the same score type as the department the candidate graduated from)

Those currently employed in a Higher Education Institution as permanent or contracted staff or previously employed for at least 2 years and resigned shall present documentary evidence of their condition.

DOCUMENTS TO BE SUBMITTED ON APPLICATION:

Application Petition (The petition must contain information regarding which department is applied to)

Curriculum Vitae in Turkish

Documentation on Education (Photocopies of Bachelor's-MA-PhD diplomas and transcripts)

Photocopy of ALES Score

Photocopy of ID

SGK (Social Security Institution) Service Breakdown

DETAILS OF THE ANNOUNCEMENT;

Application Date: 30.11.2017

Application Deadline: 14.12.2017

Preliminary appraisal Date: 18.12.2017

Date of Entrance Exam:  20.12.2017

- Diplomas received from foreign institutions must be approved for equivalency.

- Those meeting the requirements may submit their applications to the relevant units in person or by mail.

UNIT

DEPARTMENT/PROGRAM

TITLE

NUMBER

SPECIAL REQUIREMENTS

VOCATIONAL SCHOOL

Interior Design

Instructor

1

Bachelor's degree in Interior Architecture, Interior Architecture and Environmental Design or Architecture, MA thesis on the same field or a minimum work experience of 2 years in the same field after graduation (document proof to be presented).

Public Relations and Publicity

Instructor

1

Bachelor's degree in Public Relations, Public Relations and Advertising or Public Relations and Publicity, MA thesis on Public Relations and Publicity or a minimum work experience of 2 years in Public Relations and Publicity after graduation (document proof to be presented).
